headline: lululemon Leans on International: But What About Margins?
summary: LULU leans on international markets for growth as North America slows, but rising costs, tariffs and markdowns weigh on margins.

headline: Assessing Nike (NKE) Valuation After A 12% Share Price Pullback
summary: NIKE (NKE) is back in focus after recent share price weakness, with the stock down about 12% over the past month and around 29% over the past 3 months, which is prompting fresh attention from valuation minded investors. See our latest analysis for NIKE. That recent 12% 30 day share price pullback and the 28.7% year to date share price return, alongside a 19.3% 1 year total shareholder return decline, suggests momentum has been fading rather than building. If NIKE’s weak recent performance has...
